calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for prove-up hearing.
Dept. 206, Judge: CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk: JIRoque; Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff.
No Appearance by Defendant Colin H. Higgins.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal: $19,321.64
Interest: $2,572.69 (10% from 11/25/11)
Costs: $445.00
Total Judgment sought: $22,339.33

Counsel to prepare form of Judgment and to submit to Dept. 206 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
